response.overview: # Translation:  The story tells of a young man named Johari who works at a hotel. The hotel where he works is about to receive a visit from The Forbest assessor – a rating body that will evaluate whether the hotel deserves an additional star or not. However, the hotel is informed that the assessor will arrive in secret and conduct an evaluation for one week. This greatly worries Abang Gee, the hotel manager. Then Johari, together with his colleague Sabri, begins to suspect that a family staying there is The Forbest assessor. This is because the behavior and mannerisms of the family of Dato Wahab and Datin Mun along with their daughter, Neesa, are very suspicious and they do not appear to be a real family. Johari also tries to get close to Neesa, but fails. Eventually, Johari resorts to disguising himself as a veiled woman named Johana, solely to become friendly and get close to Neesa.
response.title: Mat Tudung Begins
